toast.maxNodesExceeded: Data count exceeds limit. Maximum {{maxNodes}} items allowed.
toast.invalidFormat: Please enter a valid number format (e.g. 1,2,3)
toast.emptyDataOperation: No data available. Please load or generate data first.
toast.invalidWordList: Please enter a valid word list.

featureTour.algorithmReadyDesc: Before you start practicing, visit the Knowledge Station to learn the theory behind this algorithm!
featureTour.dataStructureReadyDesc: Before you start practicing, visit the Knowledge Station to learn the theory behind this data structure!

swapButton.title: Swap Layout
swapButton.description: Click this button to swap the code panel and the canvas positions to find your preferred learning layout.

resizeHandle.title: Adjust Panel Width
resizeHandle.description: Drag the divider between the left and right panels to freely adjust the width ratio.

resizeHandleV.title: Adjust Panel Height
resizeHandleV.description: Drag the divider between the upper and lower panels to adjust the height ratio of the canvas and action bar.

canvasPanel.title: Visualization Canvas
canvasPanel.description: This is the main stage for algorithm animations. You can zoom, pan, and observe each step.

controlBar.title: Playback Controls
controlBar.description: Use play, pause, previous, and next to control animation speed, or drag the progress bar to jump to any step.

codePanel.title: Code Panel
codePanel.description: Shows the corresponding pseudocode or Python implementation. The currently executing line is highlighted automatically.

storyTab.empty: No real-world application stories available for this topic yet.
